---
title: "Starting a Blog"
date: 2026-02-22
categories: [meta]
description: "A brief introduction to this blog and what you might find here."
---

I've been meaning to start a blog for a while. This is it.

My plan is to write about things I find interesting: R, statistical computing, data visualization, and occasionally statistics itself. Posts will vary in length — some will be short notes I want to remember, others longer explorations of a method or package.

If you find something useful here, that's a bonus.
